    o.Id as OrderId,
    o.EffectiveDate,

    oi.Product2Id,
    p.Name as ProductName,

    AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'

ORDER BY o.EffectiveDate DESC': near "Order": syntax error"

args.query:
SELECT 
    o.Id as OrderId,
    o.EffectiveDate,
    oi.Id as OrderItemId,
    oi.Product2Id,
    p.Name as ProductName,
    p.Description
FROM Order o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id
WHERE o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' 
    AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' 
    AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
    AND (LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%ai%' OR LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%processing%' OR LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%unit%')
ORDER BY o.EffectiveDate DESC

    o.Id as OrderId,
    o.EffectiveDate,
    oi.Id as OrderItemId,
    oi.Product2Id,
    p.Name as ProductName,
    p.Description
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id

    AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
    AND (LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%ai%' OR LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%processing%' OR LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%unit%')
ORDER BY o.EffectiveDate DESC

args.query:
SELECT 
    o.Id as OrderId,
    o.EffectiveDate,
    oi.Id as OrderItemId,
    oi.Product2Id,
    p.Name as ProductName,
    p.Description
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id
WHERE (o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' OR o.AccountId = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX')
    AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' 
    AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
ORDER BY o.EffectiveDate DESC

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
    o.Id as OrderId,
    o.EffectiveDate,
    oi.Id as OrderItemId,
    oi.Product2Id,
    p.Name as ProductName,
    p.Description
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id
WHERE (o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' OR o.AccountId = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX')
    AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' 
    AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
ORDER BY o.EffectiveDate DESC
